Video.summary: Desiree shows how beets can make the icing on a delectable cupcake vibrant and delicious.
Video.title: Veggies Galore

Video.summary: Desiree prepares a vitamin-packed smoothie, adds beets to Greek yogurt and makes some snacks for entertaining.
Video.title: Veggies All Day Long

Video.summary: Desiree prepares matcha, a breakfast with spiced lentils with eggs, a mushroom bisque and banana bread.
Video.title: Fun and Simple

Video.summary: Spencer makes classic burgers and fries in 30 minutes for 30 dollars.
Video.title: Burgers and Fries

Video.summary: Desiree Nielsen cooks up protein-rich falafel waffles for breakfast.
Video.title: Urban Eats

Video.summary: Spencer prepares his favorite recipes for soup and sandwiches.
Video.title: Gourmet Soup & Sammies

Video.summary: Recipes from Taste Canada award-winning cookbooks, highlighting unique food.
Video.title: Tenderheart

Video.summary: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik show that food really is the language of love.
Video.title: Come Dine With Me

Video.summary: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik show that food really is the language of love.
Video.title: Game Day

Video.summary: Quick, satisfying meals are prepared on the griddle in under thirty minutes.
Video.title: 30-Minute Meals on the Fly

Video.summary: An ode to sunshine and showers; a spring-themed special with three fun desserts.
